economic_notes: Investments in Mi'kmaq Wind4all Communities Limited Partnership, Beaubassin Mi'kmaq Wind Management Ltd Solar, Photovoltaic System, E'sukitimkewey Limited Partnership, Mi'kmaq Resource Development Partnership. Band has demand loans with Bank of Montreal and Ulnooweg Development Group. Fishing licenses and permits held as intangible assets.
notes: Consolidated statements include A'Se'K Seven Generations Trust, Pictou Landing Housing Fund, and Victoria Corner Market. Investments in four partnerships accounted for at fair value or cost using modified equity method. Promissory note receivable of $35,128,997 from FNFA (First Nations Finance Authority) is a significant asset. Long-term debt includes CMHC mortgages and Bank of Montreal demand loans. Restricted funds include CMHC replacement reserve and FNFA debt reserve fund. The Seven Generations Trust revenue is included as a separate revenue line.
